heading: What you actually get from splitting the trip

cards.title: Lower blended cost
cards.text: A few nights at guesthouse rates brings your average nightly cost down — letting you afford a nicer resort for the second half than a full-length resort stay would.

cards.title: Real culture, not just a beach
cards.text: Local restaurants, everyday island life, and conversations you won't have inside a resort bubble.

cards.title: A proper reef
cards.text: Many resorts near Male have weaker house reefs than well-chosen local islands close to good snorkeling sites.

cards.title: One trip, two moods
cards.text: Relaxed and social on the local island, then quiet and private at the resort — or the other order, if you'd rather end on the beach.
